summary: First-iteration testing of TaskFlow MVP. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases passing covering auth (register/login/me/logout/session/bearer), auth-gating, workspaces, projects, members, tasks CRUD, comments. Frontend: landing, login redirect to Kanban, board (4 columns + 25 seeded cards), New Issue modal, Task Detail panel, seeded Sarah J. comment, status change via PillEditor moving card across columns, sign-out, and registration are all working. Three real issues found: (1) Emergent badge intercepts the comment submit button click; (2) Register redirects new users to a hardcoded /app/board/proj_coreplatform URL where they have no access (shows 'Project not found'); (3) topbar shows 'LinearSync' for newly-registered users who actually own their own auto-created workspace.

ui_bugs.issue: The fixed 'Made with Emergent' badge in the bottom-right corner overlays and intercepts pointer events for the comment submit button (task-detail-comment-submit-btn), preventing users from posting comments via the button. Pressing Enter or using JS click works, but normal click is blocked.

After registering a brand-new user, the topbar workspace name still displays 'LinearSync' (the demo workspace) instead of the new user's auto-created workspace name (e.g. 'New's Workspace'). Looks like the workspace label is either hardcoded or cached.

integration_issues.issue: On successful register, frontend redirects to hardcoded '/app/board/proj_coreplatform'. New users do not have access to that demo project, so Board.jsx shows 'Project not found' error and empty columns. The redirect should go to the user's first project (or to a 'create project' screen if none exists).

issues: Right-side meta column (Status/Priority/Assignee PillEditor buttons) extends off-viewport at 1920px width on subsequent re-opens of the same panel, requiring horizontal scrolling to reach. Initial open works fine.

action_items: Re-position or z-index-adjust the comment submit button (or the Emergent badge container) so the submit button is clickable. The badge has pointer-events on the entire anchor area covering the corner; consider adding right padding to the comment composer or placing the submit button to the left of the badge zone.

After /api/auth/register success, redirect the user to a sensible destination: either the workspace's first project or a 'Create your first project' empty-state, instead of the hard-coded '/app/board/proj_coreplatform'.
Ensure the topbar workspace name is sourced from GET /api/workspaces/current rather than being hardcoded to 'LinearSync'.
Investigate TaskDetailPanel layout: right meta column status PillEditor goes offscreen after first close/re-open (likely due to panel width state or sticky positioning).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~775 lines containing auth, models, helpers, CRUD, seed -- consider splitting into routers/, models/, deps/, seed/ modules.
update_task expression on server.py L506 is hard to reason about: `v is not None or k in ["assignee_id","tag","description"]` -- works but unclear. Prefer explicit None-allow-list logic.
/api/auth/session sets samesite=none secure cookies but does not encrypt or rotate the externally-issued session_token; consider tying to user_agent/ip for hardening.
create_task uses find_one_and_update without return_document=AFTER, then trusts pre-update next_task_number; this is correct but fragile -- add a comment or use AFTER then subtract 1 to be explicit.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per browser spec; while httpx tests pass, browsers will reject credentialed XHR with wildcard origin. Set explicit origins for production.
seed_data_creation: No seed creation by tester; backend already idempotently seeds demo user, LinearSync workspace, proj_coreplatform with 25 tasks across 4 statuses + 1 Sarah J. comment on task_seed_0254.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py is comprehensive (19 tests, all green). For frontend, the 3 remaining issues are: (1) Emergent badge overlapping comment submit button -- test with JS click() workaround or wait until fixed; (2) post-register redirect to hardcoded proj URL -- new users currently land on 'Project not found' page; (3) topbar shows stale 'LinearSync' for non-demo users. Status-change-via-PillEditor flow works (verified card moved from in_progress to Done column).

rca of the issue.comment_submit_button_blocked: Reproduction: login as demo, open task CORE-254, type a comment, click submit button -> Playwright reports 'subtree intercepts pointer events' from a#emergent-badge. Root cause: the 'Made with Emergent' anchor is fixed at bottom-right with high z-index and overlaps the slide-over composer. Mitigation: add bottom padding to the slide-over comment composer (e.g. mb-12) OR reduce z-index of the badge OR move submit to the input's left side.
rca of the issue.new_user_project_not_found: Reproduction: register a fresh user -> redirected to /app/board/proj_coreplatform -> 'Project not found' shown. Root cause: register success handler in AuthContext / Register.jsx hardcodes the demo project_id. Mitigation: after register, call GET /api/projects, then either navigate to first project or to a 'create project' screen.
rca of the issue.topbar_workspace_name_stale: Likely the AppShell or TopBar hardcodes 'LinearSync' or reads from a stale source. Verify and source from GET /api/workspaces/current.
